name: Raspado (Buzz Cut)
prompt: extremely short buzz cut, uniformly shaved with clippers, scalp visible, clean hairline, military style, very short hair

name: Degradê Baixo (Low Fade)
prompt: low skin fade haircut, hair tapering very low near the ears and nape, short neat hair on top, sharp professional hairline

name: Degradê Médio (Mid Fade)
prompt: mid skin fade haircut, smooth gradient starting at temple level, short clipper-cut top, clean barber finish

name: Degradê Alto (High Fade)
prompt: high skin fade, sides and back shaved high up to the crown, very short textured hair on top, disconnected look

name: Americano (Taper Fade)
prompt: taper fade haircut, subtle fade only at sideburns and neckline, natural hair length on sides, clean edges, professional look

name: Corte César
prompt: caesar haircut, short horizontal fringe, blunt cut bangs, textured short top, low fade on sides

name: Cacho Curto com Degradê
prompt: short curly hair on top, defined curls, low drop fade on sides, clean perimeter, natural texture

name: Crespo Curto (Militar)
prompt: short coily afro hair, high and tight military style, clean tapered sides, crisp line-up, 360 waves texture

name: Moicano Disfarçado (Burst Fade)
prompt: burst fade haircut, circular fade around the ears, mohawk silhouette, textured medium length hair on top and back

name: Mullet Moderno
prompt: modern mullet haircut, short textured sides, messy medium top, significantly longer hair at the nape and back

name: Black Power (Crespo Grande)
prompt: large voluminous black power afro, spherical shape, dense coily texture, natural high volume hair

name: Coque Samurai
prompt: man bun samurai style, long hair tied in a top knot, undercut sides for contrast, clean shaved nape

name: Cavanhaque
prompt: goatee beard, facial hair on chin and mustache connected, clean-shaven cheeks, sharp edges
